Starting Up SQL 11
Before we look at SQL syntax in detail, let's first get ourselves set up to run SQL queries in Jupyter.
Approach #1: SQL Magic
1. Load the sql Module.
Load 9issql cell magic to allow the Jupyter notebook to understand SQL.
FYI: %sql is called line magic because it only applies to one line. We will see shortly that 49ssql applies to an entire cell. So, it's called cell magic.
%load_ext sql
